name: Flash Un Kas
recipeInstructions:
1. Work the butter and cream cheese into the flour.
2. Chill thoroughly, preferably overnight.
3. Take pieces of dough and roll them very thin.
4. Cut with a round cookie cutter, size of a water glass or larger if desired.
5. Mix together ingredients for one of the fillings.
6. Spread on dough, fold over, and bake at 400°F until brown.
7. These may be shaped earlier and baked just before serving.
8. Serve as an appetizer with beer, except the anchovy or caviar which should be served with cocktails.
9. Make the anchovy and caviar appetizers somewhat smaller than the ones that are to be served with beer.
